description_long: This house is a modern, single-story residence surrounded by dense landscaping, including tall evergreen trees and manicured shrubs. The structure features a mix of flat and gently sloped roofs, with large floor-to-ceiling windows dominating several facades, allowing for ample natural light. The exterior is composed of a combination of white and wood-toned panels, creating a clean, contemporary aesthetic. A paved driveway leads to the main entrance, which is accentuated by a row of shrubs and a clear path. The property is enclosed by a perimeter of trees, providing privacy and a natural buffer from the surroundings. The overall layout is open and linear, with outdoor spaces integrated into the design.
description: A modern, single-story house with flat and sloped roofs, large glass windows, and surrounded by dense evergreen landscaping. The exterior combines white and wood finishes, with a prominent driveway and private, tree-lined perimeter.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, driveway, and a clear path flanked by shrubs, with large windows and a mix of white and wood panels visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlights the backyard area, more extensive glass facades, and a prominent white tree, with the driveway less visible.
description_view_2: Side view reveals the linear layout, integration of outdoor spaces, and the mix of roof types, with dense tree coverage on both sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the back entrance, additional landscaping, and the continuation of the modern design with large windows and wood accents.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a paved path, flanked by shrubs, with a minimalist door and no porch or overhang.
